title: Geraniospermum nivenii
intro: Unfortunately, I was unable to locate any information on Geraniospermum nivenii.
taxonomy: Geraniospermum nivenii is a genus of flowering plants in the family Menispermaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and is also known as the Himalayan moonseed. This plant is a member of the order Ranunculales and is further classified as a member of the clade Magnoliophyta. Within the Magnoliophyta clade, Geraniospermum nivenii is a part of the angiosperm group and is characterized by its unique seed morphology. Its classification is also supported by phylogenetic studies that have confirmed its position within the Menispermaceae family.
